name: Image Resources NL
description: Image Resources NL is an established, profitable Australian mineral sands mining company, operating its 100%-owned, high-grade, zircon-rich Boonanarring Project in the infrastructure-rich North Perth Basin in Western Australia. The company is focused on the development of its mineral sands projects, including Boonanarring and Atlas, to produce high-quality zircon and titanium minerals (ilmenite, rutile, and leucoxene) for global markets.
